string.text: Allows NPCs to loot stashes that weren't made by player (ones created at new game/given as reward/found from PDA etc). Keep in mind that when you open a stash like this for the first time, it will become lootable regardless.
Time (real-life seconds) after which script picks a next random squad and checks stashes around it. Increasing it will make NPCs loot stashes less often. \n \n Default: 4.0

Frequency of looting during sleep, in two words: you sleep one hour and it runs function "x" amount of times to match the time passed. Based on "Update Time" option. Value of "1" means real-time, I recommend lower. 
 
 "0" disables this option. 
 
 Default: 0.25

Increase if you want low chance stashes to be looted more often, for example: two stashes are saved with proced chances 1 and 200, if you increase this slider to 100% they will have 201 and 400 (essentially increasing lower chance stash from example to be looted to 50%). \n \n Default: 20
Cost of paid stash per day.
Maximum amount of days player is allowed to buy.
Allows to see stuff in console for debugging.
